title: Mello
description: Mello is a shader with high performance and great visuals.
body:
# Mello

Mello is a shader designed to deliver high performance with great visuals.
It uses efficient and minimal algorithms for visuals to get better performance.
It has different profiles and configurable options.

![Preview of the shader](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/423d07bab38307d7a956ffabec013dcac02e12f3.webp)

- Soft Large Bloom
- Filtered Shadows
- Volumetric Fog and Water
- Accurate Subsurface Scattering
- Reflections

## Coming Soon :
- Clouds
- Dynamic lighting
- Penumbra shadows
- More accurate effects
- More efficient code

Currently in development
